query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS distribution_rules (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  house_id INT NOT NULL,
  rule_type ENUM('inter_house', 'intra_house', 'treasury', 'derivative') NOT NULL,
  source_percent DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  destination_type ENUM('root_treasury', 'ancestral_treasury', 'circulation_pool', 'reserve', 'inheritance') NOT NULL,
  destination_house_id INT,
  min_cap_percent DECIMAL(5,2),
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

  house_id INT NOT NULL,
  rule_type ENUM('inter_house', 'intra_house', 'treasury', 'derivative') NOT NULL,
  source_percent DECIMAL(5,2) NOT NULL,
  destination_type ENUM('root_treasury', 'ancestral_treasury', 'circulation_pool', 'reserve', 'inheritance') NOT NULL,
  destination_house_id INT,
  min_cap_percent DECIMAL(5,2),
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
